input.content:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sessions (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  claude_session_id TEXT,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  color TEXT,
  repo_path TEXT,
  worktree_path TEXT,
  worktree_branch TEXT,
  model TEXT,
  total_tokens INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_cost REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  duration_seconds INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
  updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS messages (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  role TEXT NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  tokens INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  cost REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_session ON messages(session_id, created_at);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS snapshots (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  context_state TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  file_path TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pins (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  type TEXT NOT NULL,
  target TEXT NOT NULL,
  mode TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'prompt',
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pins_session ON pins(session_id);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS settings (
  key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  value TEXT NOT NULL
);

content.text: The file already exists with the correct content -- it was created by a previous run. Let me verify all 5 files exist and have the right content.

All 5 files have been created successfully:

1. `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/db/migrations/001_init.sql` -- SQLite schema with tables for sessions, messages, snapshots, pins, and settings
2. `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shared/types.ts` -- TypeScript type definitions for Session, Message, Pin, Snapshot, Skill, TabState, StatusBarData, etc.
3. `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shared/config.ts` -- Configuration paths (db, sockets, skills dirs, worker entry) and `ensureDirs()` helper
4. `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shared/ipc.ts` -- IPC protocol with length-prefixed JSON framing, message types for shell-worker communication, and Unix Domain Socket helpers
5. `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shared/db.ts` -- Database layer with better-sqlite3, migration runner, and CRUD functions for all tables
